fixtures.description: merge returns an array; this engine's loose == is false for array-vs-array, so the flattened result is compared via its JS string coercion ("1,2,3,4")
{"merge": [1, 2, [3, 4]]} flattens to [1, 2, 3, 4], compared via its JS string coercion ("1,2,3,4")
an empty array coerces to the empty string under JS string coercion
